[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111 a
1 1111111 a
2 1111111 a
3 0011110 4
4 1111001 5
5 1101111 6
6 0111010 4
7 1010111 5

01 10 1100111 5
12 21 0010111 4
23 32 1010111 5 match 7
34 43 1101111 6 match 5
45 54 0111101 5
56 65 1111110 6
67 76 1111011 6
70 07 1111001 5 match 4

02 20 1110011 5
13 31 1000111 4
24 42 0111011 5
35 53 1011111 6
46 64 1111011 6
57 75 1111101 6
60 06 1111011 6
71 17 1111111 a match 0 1 2

03 30 1100111 5
14 41 0101111 5
25 52 0011110 4 match 3
36 63 1111111 a match 0 1 2
47 74 1111001 5 match 4
50 05 1111101 6
61 16 1111111 a match 0 1 2
72 27 1111011 6

04 40 1101001 4
15 51 0011111 5
26 62 1111010 5
37 73 1111111 a match 0 1 2
